# three.ws — Complete Page Index

three.ws is the AI-agent layer for the open web: build, embed, monetize, and trade autonomous agents with real 3D avatars, on-chain identity (ERC-8004), pay-per-call (x402), and pump.fun token launches.

Canonical site: https://three.ws
Tagline: Give your AI a body.
Source code: https://github.com/nirholas/three.ws
Contact / social: https://x.com/trythreews

This file is generated from data/pages.json. It lists every public surface on the site, grouped by section, so AI agents and crawlers can navigate without scraping the home page.

## Main

Entry points into the product.

### Home

URL: https://three.ws/

Landing page. 3D AI agents that think on IBM watsonx.ai (Granite) — the pitch, live agent demos, and the front door to every flow.

### Discover

URL: https://three.ws/discover

On-chain agent directory (ERC-8004 + Solana). Browse, search, and inspect every registered agent.

### Avatar Gallery

URL: https://three.ws/gallery

Every public 3D avatar in the system, browsable as a grid.

### Walk

URL: https://three.ws/walk

Drive a 3D avatar around with a joystick or WASD — toggle the back camera for AR-style passthrough.

### Marketplace

URL: https://three.ws/marketplace

Buy access to agents, skills, and avatars from other creators.

### Skills Marketplace

URL: https://three.ws/skills

Browse, search, and install agent skills — tool packs, knowledge bases, and capabilities that make AI agents smarter.

### Community

URL: https://three.ws/community

Featured creators, builds, and conversations from the three.ws community.

### Sitemap

URL: https://three.ws/sitemap

Human-readable index of every page on three.ws.

### Characters

URL: https://three.ws/characters

Discover AI characters on three.ws. Chat, trade, and create.

### three.ws on IBM watsonx — Agent Galaxy

URL: https://three.ws/ibm/galaxy

three.ws is an IBM Business Partner. Open-source 3D AI agents that think on IBM Granite via watsonx.ai and give watsonx Orchestrate agents a face, voice, and on-chain identity.

## Build

Create and customize an agent.

### Get Started

URL: https://three.ws/start
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

5-step onboarding wizard: create a 3D avatar, name your agent, enable skills, deploy an embed widget, and set up monetization — all in under 5 minutes.

### Create Agent

URL: https://three.ws/create

Wizard for building a new agent: avatar, brain (LLM + prompt), skills, and on-chain identity.

### Create an Agent

URL: https://three.ws/create-agent

Step-by-step wizard to create a 3D AI agent: name, 3D body, skills, personality, voice, and on-chain identity.

### Viewer

URL: https://three.ws/app

Drag-and-drop glTF/GLB viewer for inspecting 3D models in the browser.

### glTF Validator

URL: https://three.ws/validation

Khronos-spec validator for glTF/GLB files. Paste a URL or upload a model.

### Widget Studio

URL: https://three.ws/studio

Pick an avatar, configure embed options, copy a one-line snippet for your site.

### Artifact Viewer

URL: https://three.ws/artifact

Renders Claude artifact bundles as standalone embeddable apps.

### Widgets Gallery

URL: https://three.ws/widgets

Pre-built chat, voice, and 3D-avatar widgets you can drop into any page.

### Hydrate

URL: https://three.ws/hydrate

Take an existing on-chain agent (ERC-8004 / Solana) and attach a 3D body, voice, and skills.

### Features

URL: https://three.ws/features

Full feature overview of the three.ws platform: avatars, agents, on-chain identity, x402 payments, and embedding.

### Forge — Text to 3D Model

URL: https://three.ws/features/forge

Type a description, get a downloadable textured 3D model (GLB). Powered by Flux image generation and TRELLIS 3D reconstruction.

### Scan — Selfie to 3D Avatar

URL: https://three.ws/features/scan

Point your camera at your face, hold still, and walk away with a rigged 3D avatar in 60 seconds. Free, in your browser.

### Play — Live 3D Coin Worlds

URL: https://three.ws/features/play

Every pump.fun coin gets a deterministic 3D world. Walk in as your avatar, chat with holders, and trade — all in the browser.

### Walk — 3D Avatar AR

URL: https://three.ws/features/walk

Drive your AI agent's 3D avatar with WASD or joystick. Toggle AR mode and it walks on your real floor through your phone camera.

### Studio — Embeddable AI Widget Builder

URL: https://three.ws/features/studio

Configure avatar, voice, and knowledge base in the Widget Studio, then copy one script tag to embed a 3D AI agent anywhere.

### Marketplace — Discover and Fork AI Agents

URL: https://three.ws/features/marketplace

Browse hundreds of community-built AI agents with 3D avatars and on-chain identities. Fork any agent, buy paid skills, and ship in minutes.

### Agent Exchange — AI Agents Paying Each Other

URL: https://three.ws/features/agent-exchange

Watch two AI agents with 3D avatars autonomously negotiate and pay each other for crypto intelligence via x402 micropayments on Solana.

### Deploy — On-Chain Agent Identity

URL: https://three.ws/features/deploy

Register your AI agent on Solana via ERC-8004 and Metaplex Core. Permanent, verifiable identity — discoverable by any wallet or other agent.

### New Agent

URL: https://three.ws/agent/new

Create a new agent from scratch — avatar, brain, skills, and on-chain identity.

### Selfie to Avatar

URL: https://three.ws/create/selfie

One selfie. About a minute. A rigged 3D avatar that works everywhere.

### Import an avatar URL

URL: https://three.ws/import/rpm

Import any GLB or glTF avatar into three.ws and give it an agent brain.

### Claim threews.sol Subdomain

URL: https://three.ws/threews/claim

Claim your own <name>.threews.sol subdomain and get a Brave-resolvable personal showcase page.

### Voice Lab

URL: https://three.ws/voice

Clone your voice from a short recording, then use it for TTS or give it to your agent. Side-by-side comparison of voice models.

## Labs

Experimental features actively shipping. Expect fast iteration.

### Launchpad Studio

URL: https://three.ws/launchpad

Build a hosted 3D launchpad, token page, concierge, or showroom on a three.ws subdomain.

### Multi-LLM Brain

URL: https://three.ws/brain

Send one prompt to Claude, GPT, Qwen, ModelScope, and Groq simultaneously. Side-by-side streaming with latency and token stats.

### Lipsync (TTS)

URL: https://three.ws/lipsync

Type text, stream it through the avatar's voice, and the mouth animates in real time via wawa-lipsync viseme detection.

### Lipsync (Mic)

URL: https://three.ws/lipsync/mic

Feed live mic audio through the viseme analyser and watch the avatar's mouth track your voice in real time.

### Avatar Artifact

URL: https://three.ws/avatar-artifact

Standalone Three.js viewer for avatar artifacts — embeddable and shareable without any wrapper page.

### Playground

URL: https://three.ws/playground

Sandbox for experimenting with agents, prompts, and 3D scenes.

### Labs Showcase

URL: https://three.ws/labs

A curated gallery of three.ws's most powerful — and most hidden — features. Find and try things you didn't know existed.

## Crypto

On-chain features: pay-per-call, token launches, vanity wallets.

### Pay (x402)

URL: https://three.ws/pay

Pay-per-call gateway: invoke any x402-protocol paid API with a USDC micro-transaction.

### Pump.fun Stream

URL: https://three.ws/pumpfun

Mint and trade pump.fun agent tokens on Solana. Live feed of every launch.

### Pump Live

URL: https://three.ws/pump-live

Real-time SSE feed of every pump.fun launch as it happens.

### Pump Dashboard

URL: https://three.ws/pump-dashboard

Pump.fun trading desk: watchlists, scanner, quotes, portfolio, and live charts.

### Strategy Lab

URL: https://three.ws/strategy-lab

Build DCA and subscription strategies that trade on-chain on your behalf.

### Solana Vanity Wallet

URL: https://three.ws/vanity-wallet

Grind a Solana address with a custom prefix using your browser's GPU.

### ETH Vanity (CREATE2)

URL: https://three.ws/eth-vanity

Grind a vanity smart-contract address using the ThreeWSFactory CREATE2 deployer on BSC.

### Pump Visualizer

URL: https://three.ws/pump-visualizer

3D visualizer of trending pump.fun tokens — live market data rendered as an interactive scene.

### watsonx Constellation

URL: https://three.ws/constellation

Live Solana tokens in a 3D galaxy, positioned in semantic space by IBM Granite embeddings on watsonx.ai. Click a star for a live IBM Granite analysis.

### x402 Bazaar

URL: https://three.ws/bazaar

Search and browse the x402 facilitator catalog. Filter by network, price, and extensions. Pay any service in one click.

### Agent Lookup

URL: https://three.ws/lookup

Resolve any three.ws agent by Solana mint, agent ID, avatar ID, or slug — renders its interactive 3D avatar alongside its on-chain identity (collection, owner, agent wallet, Active/x402 status, Metaplex/Solscan/Magic Eden links).

### x402 Arbitrage

URL: https://three.ws/arbitrage

Cross-provider price disparities surfaced live from the merged x402 facilitator catalog. Find the cheapest endpoint for any capability.

### x402 Providers

URL: https://three.ws/providers

Quantified operator profiles for the x402 paid API catalog. Service counts, price bands, dominant categories, and the underlying listings.

### GMGN Smart Money

URL: https://three.ws/gmgn

Live smart-money signals narrated by a 3D AI agent. Tracks which wallets are loading on Solana, Ethereum, Base, and BNB Chain in real time.

### $THREE Live · Protocol Pulse

URL: https://three.ws/three-live

The $THREE protocol as a living 3D organism. Real on-chain trades pulse through it in real time — each transaction emits a particle burst, whales send shockwaves, with a live trade feed and a HUD of price, market cap, holders, and volume.

### Fact Checker

URL: https://three.ws/fact-checker

Pay $0.10 per claim. The agent searches across authoritative sources, pays per retrieval via x402, and returns a verdict with cited evidence and a signed attestation.

### Pay-As-You-Learn Tutor

URL: https://three.ws/tutor

Ask anything and pay a cent per answer. A pay-as-you-learn AI tutor that bills $0.01 per explanation in USDC over x402, with a live itemized session invoice and signed attestation.

### Unstoppable Agent

URL: https://three.ws/unstoppable

Live dashboard for an autonomous agent that funds itself via x402 micropayments. Watch its balance, earnings, costs, and daily reflections in real time.

### Endpoint Shopper

URL: https://three.ws/shopper

Describe a task and set a budget. An AI agent discovers relevant x402 endpoints via the Bazaar, chains them together, and synthesizes a final answer — paying per API call.

### Forever — etch a message into Bitcoin

URL: https://three.ws/forever

Inscribe a message onto the Bitcoin blockchain. It stays there. Forever.

### Pole Club

URL: https://three.ws/club

A 3D club where dancers only perform when you send a micro-tip. Pay $0.001 per routine, settled on-chain via x402 on Base or Solana.

## Agent Tools

Manage, talk to, and deploy individual agents.

### Chat

URL: https://three.ws/chat

Talk to your agent. Voice, text, and tool-use in one interface.

### Agent Home

URL: https://three.ws/agent

Default landing for an agent instance — chat, embed, and remix actions.

### Agents Index

URL: https://three.ws/agents

Browse every registered agent on three.ws.

### My Agents

URL: https://three.ws/my-agents
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Your private collection of agents and avatars. Requires sign-in.

### Reputation Explorer

URL: https://three.ws/reputation

Inspect on-chain reputation scores and attestations for any agent.

## Account

Sign-in, dashboard, billing.

### Sign in

URL: https://three.ws/login

Sign in with email, GitHub, or a connected wallet.

### Create account

URL: https://three.ws/register

Create a new three.ws account.

### Forgot password

URL: https://three.ws/forgot-password

Request a password-reset email.

### Dashboard

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Your account dashboard: agents, avatars, payments, keys, MCP servers, monetization, billing.

### Dashboard · Account

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/account
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Manage connected wallets, SNS, delegation, and action log.

### Dashboard · Analytics

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/analytics
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

API call volume, x402 spend, and per-agent usage breakdowns.

### Dashboard · Settings

URL: https://three.ws/dashboard/settings
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Avatar storage modes (R2 vs IPFS), sessions, notifications, and preferences.

### Settings

URL: https://three.ws/settings
Auth: required (sign-in)
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Account, profile, and notification settings.

## Learn

Docs, tutorials, and reference.

### Docs

URL: https://three.ws/docs

Full documentation: SDKs, API reference, embedding, agent system, smart contracts.

### Docs · Start Here

URL: https://three.ws/docs/start-here

Plain-language introduction to three.ws for creators and non-developers — what it is, who it’s for, and where to begin.

### Docs · Make Your First Agent

URL: https://three.ws/docs/make-your-agent

Step-by-step guide to creating a 3D AI agent in the browser with no code required.

### Docs · Share & Embed

URL: https://three.ws/docs/share-and-embed

Three ways to put your agent in front of people: share a link, embed an iframe, or use the web component.

### Docs · Do I Need Crypto?

URL: https://three.ws/docs/do-i-need-crypto

Honest answers to the wallet and payment questions — what requires crypto, what doesn’t, and how payments work.

### Docs · Quick Start

URL: https://three.ws/docs/quick-start

Five-minute walkthrough: create an agent, embed it, get a paid call.

### Docs · Agent System

URL: https://three.ws/docs/agent-system

How agents, avatars, skills, and memories fit together.

### Docs · ERC-8004

URL: https://three.ws/docs/erc8004

Reference for the on-chain agent identity standard.

### Docs · Embedding

URL: https://three.ws/docs/embedding

Embed an agent via iframe, oEmbed, or the <agent-3d> web component.

### Docs · <agent-3d>

URL: https://three.ws/docs/web-component

Reference for the <agent-3d> custom element.

### Docs · MCP

URL: https://three.ws/docs/mcp

Expose your agent as an MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, and other clients.

### Docs · Skills

URL: https://three.ws/docs/skills

Write, package, and monetize agent skills.

### Docs · Widgets

URL: https://three.ws/docs/widgets

Build and publish reusable chat and 3D widgets.

### Docs · API Reference

URL: https://three.ws/docs/api-reference

Full HTTP API reference.

### Docs · SDK

URL: https://three.ws/docs/sdk

JavaScript / Node SDK for three.ws.

### Docs · Listings & Distribution

URL: https://three.ws/docs/listings

Cloud marketplaces and ecosystem directories where three.ws is listed (Alibaba Cloud, BNB Chain Dappbay, and more).

### Tutorials

URL: https://three.ws/tutorials

Step-by-step build guides.

### Status

URL: https://three.ws/status

Live operational status and 90-day uptime history for the platform, API, and x402 surfaces — probed every 5 minutes.

## Blog

Long-form announcements, launches, and writing from three.ws.

### Blog

URL: https://three.ws/blog

Editorial index of three.ws launches and long-form posts.

### 3D + AI + Web3 Just Converged: three.ws Shipped the Whole Stack

URL: https://three.ws/blog/3d-ai-crypto-convergence

A web2 unicorn just raised ~$200M to build 3D AI agents. three.ws is the only crypto-native team that already shipped the full stack: browser 3D, a multi-provider MCP runtime, and on-chain agent wallets that pay each other in USDC. Open source on GitHub, published to npm, and live on Anthropic

### three.ws Wins DEXTools Social Boost — $5,543 $three Buyback

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-dextools-social-boost-buyback

three.ws is DEXTools

### three.ws Featured on the Alibaba Cloud Marketplace Blog

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-featured-on-alibaba-cloud-marketplace-blog

Alibaba Cloud Marketplace published an editorial on three.ws — browser-native 3D AI agents you deploy with a single <agent-3d> tag, with a Claude-powered runtime, ERC-8004 identity, and an Apache 2.0 open-source stack.

### Showcasing the three.ws × IBM Partnership

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-ibm-collaboration

three.ws and IBM showcased their partnership: embedding a persistent, on-chain 3D agent into any platform as easily as a YouTube video, with the agent brain running on IBM watsonx.ai and Granite.

### We turned every memecoin into a live 3D world you can walk into

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-play-coin-communities

How we built /play: isolated multiplayer worlds keyed to a token

### three.ws Joins the AWS Partner Network

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-aws-partner

three.ws is now an official AWS Partner, enrolled in the AWS Partner Network (APN) Software Path as a Technology Partner. The open-source platform for 3D AI agents on-chain is the first fully Web3-native ISV to join APN with a Solana / EVM on-chain identity stack.

### three.ws Launches on AWS Marketplace, Bringing On-Chain 3D AI Agents to Enterprise Procurement

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-on-aws-marketplace

three.ws is now live on AWS Marketplace as a SaaS subscription. AWS customers can subscribe directly, bill to their AWS invoice, spend AWS Activate credits, and count three.ws toward Enterprise Discount Program commitments — for the first fully on-chain 3D AI agent platform.

### We Just Shipped the 3D Layer for the Internet — <agent-3d>

URL: https://three.ws/blog/agent-3d-web-component

Drop one <agent-3d> web component on your site and give any page an AI with LLM brain, memory, emotions, DOM awareness, password field privacy, and an on-chain identity that lives forever.

### 2,500 New 3D Animations Coming to three.ws

URL: https://three.ws/blog/2500-new-animations

three.ws is expanding its animation library with 2,500 new 3D animations — giving every agent vastly more expressive range across emotions, gestures, reactions, and activities.

### three.ws Listed on Coinbase x402 Bazaar and agentic.market

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-x402-bazaar

three.ws is now a verified service provider on the Coinbase x402 Bazaar and agentic.market — the app store and discovery layer for AI agents with 480k active agents and $50M in volume.

### Real-Time Voice Interaction with 3D AI Agents — Preview

URL: https://three.ws/blog/real-time-voice-interaction

three.ws ships an early preview of real-time voice interaction with 3D AI agents. Agents listen, reason with memory and emotions, respond in voice, and support AR/VR.

### three.ws Launches on Alibaba Cloud Marketplace, Bringing Native x402 Agent Payments to Hyperscale

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-on-alibaba-cloud-marketplace

three.ws is now live on the Alibaba Cloud International Marketplace. The listing makes <agent-3d> available to every Alibaba Cloud customer worldwide and activates HTTP 402 / x402 agent payments at hyperscale.

### three.ws Listed on BNB Chain's Dappbay Directory

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-on-bnb-chain-dappbay

three.ws is now listed on Dappbay, BNB Chain

### three.ws Teams Up with HackerNoon

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-hackernoon-partnership

three.ws is partnering with HackerNoon to launch a builder-focused initiative with feature articles, tutorials, and developer guides for those shipping with AI.

### three.ws Is Now Live on CoinMarketCap

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-on-coinmarketcap

three.ws is now live on CoinMarketCap — join the community page for real-time discussion and stay updated on the platform for 3D on-chain AI agents.

### How to Embed 3D On-Chain Agents on Your Site

URL: https://three.ws/blog/how-to-embed-3d-onchain-agents

A complete walkthrough for embedding a three.ws 3D on-chain agent on any website using the <agent-3d> web component — from setup to CORS configuration and page integration.

### three.ws Integrates the Pump.fun Agent Payments SDK

URL: https://three.ws/blog/pumpfun-agent-payments-sdk

three.ws has integrated the Pump.fun agent payments SDK. Your 3D AI agent doesn

### three.ws Ships Inside SperaxUSD — DeFi Gets a 3D Face

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-speraxusd-integration

three.ws is now integrated with SperaxOS, fully wired into the production DeFi stack. Agents get a 3D body, memory, voice, and an on-chain identity — and they react to DeFi events in real time.

### Agent Builder Live — Studio Redesign, LLM Chat Upgrade

URL: https://three.ws/blog/agent-builder-studio-launch

three.ws ships Agent Builder, an improved Studio design, and a major LLM Chat upgrade. Agents are now payable, tradeable, and discoverable.

### Full Animation & Emotion Control — Plus Pump.fun Live Feed

URL: https://three.ws/blog/animation-emotion-control

three.ws now ships full animation and emotion control for 3D agents, with live Pump.fun feed integration. Your agents react to any API or data feed in real time.

### three.ws Is Now an Official IBM Business Partner

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-ibm-business-partner

three.ws has been accepted into IBM

### $THREE Listed on Coinbase, CoinGecko, Jupiter, and Investing.com

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-token-listings

$THREE is now listed and verified across Coinbase, CoinGecko, Jupiter Exchange, and Investing.com — giving the three.ws community every major on-ramp and price discovery surface.

### Solana Wallet Integration for Autonomous 3D Agents

URL: https://three.ws/blog/solana-wallet-integration

three.ws 3D agents now have native Solana wallets. Your agent can hold and spend money autonomously — earning from skills, paying for inference, and executing on-chain transactions while you sleep.

### three.ws Joins Google Cloud for Web3 Startups

URL: https://three.ws/blog/three-ws-google-cloud-partnership

three.ws is joining forces with Google Cloud, bringing cloud-scale rendering and AI infrastructure to 3D on-chain agents.

## Machine-readable

Indexes and well-known files for crawlers and AI agents.

### sitemap.xml

URL: https://three.ws/sitemap.xml
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

XML sitemap for search-engine crawlers.

### llms.txt

URL: https://three.ws/llms.txt
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

AI-agent-friendly index of every public page (Howard convention).

### llms-full.txt

URL: https://three.ws/llms-full.txt
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Expanded llms.txt with full descriptions and content hints.

### robots.txt

URL: https://three.ws/robots.txt
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Crawler directives.

### OpenAPI

URL: https://three.ws/openapi.json
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

Machine-readable HTTP API spec.

### .well-known/x402

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/x402
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

x402 paid-API discovery document.

### .well-known/agent-attestation-schemas

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/agent-attestation-schemas
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

JSON schemas for agent attestations.

### .well-known/oauth-authorization-server

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

OAuth 2.1 authorization-server metadata.

### .well-known/chat-plugin.json

URL: https://three.ws/.well-known/chat-plugin.json
Indexable: no (excluded from sitemap)

ChatGPT-style plugin manifest.

## News

Product launches, integrations, and announcements from three.ws.

### News & Announcements

URL: https://three.ws/news/

Product launches, integrations, and announcements from three.ws.

### three.ws Wins DEXTools Social Boost — $5,543 $three Buyback

URL: https://three.ws/news/three-ws-dextools-social-boost-buyback

three.ws is DEXTools' Social Boost winner of the week, earning a $5,543 buyback of $three. The DEXTools wallet now holds a total of 2.47M $three.

### three.ws Featured on the Alibaba Cloud Marketplace Blog

URL: https://three.ws/news/three-ws-featured-on-alibaba-cloud-marketplace-blog

Alibaba Cloud Marketplace published an editorial introducing three.ws — Render, Embody, Register, Embed: browser-native 3D AI agents deployed with a single <agent-3d> tag, with a Claude-powered runtime, ERC-8004 identity, and an Apache 2.0 open-source stack.

### One Month In: How three.ws Built the 3D Agent Layer of the Internet

URL: https://three.ws/news/three-ws-first-month-3d-agent-layer

In one month, three.ws went from launch to global coverage: browser-native 3D AI agents listed across major exchanges and data platforms, deployed on four hyperscale clouds, live in Anthropic's MCP Registry, and covered from CoinMarketCap to Vogue. A look back at 30 days of shipping.

### three.ws Brings Autonomous Payments and 3D Generation to Anthropic's Official MCP Registry

URL: https://three.ws/news/cmc-mcp-registry-article

CoinMarketCap article: three.ws brings autonomous payments and 3D generation to Anthropic's official MCP Registry — two new MCP servers give Claude and any MCP client the ability to spawn 3D agents and make on-chain x402 payments via the Coinbase-powered x402 Bazaar.

### three.ws Ships Two New MCP Servers: x402 Bazaar + 3D Agent Avatar

URL: https://three.ws/news/mcp-servers-x402-bazaar-coinbase

two new MCP servers are now live in Anthropic's official MCP Registry: the x402 Bazaar MCP (powered by Coinbase) lets agents discover, pay for, and call any x402 service in USDC settled on-chain; the 3D Avatar MCP lets any Claude or MCP client spawn a full browser-native 3D agent.

### $three Listed on Bybit Alpha

URL: https://three.ws/news/bybit-alpha-listing

$three is now listed on Bybit Alpha — the dedicated launchpad for new and emerging assets on Bybit, one of the world's top three crypto exchanges.

### Showcasing the three.ws × IBM Partnership

URL: https://three.ws/news/ibm-collaboration-showcase

three.ws and IBM are partners, and we shared a live demo publicly: a persistent, on-chain 3D agent embedded into any page as easily as a YouTube video — thinking on IBM watsonx.ai and Granite. The public /ibm demos are independent developer tools, not official partnership deliverables. The integration ships as an open-source MCP server and a first-class watsonx provider in the three.ws agent runtime, running on your own IBM Cloud credentials.

### The Animations & Poses Studio is officially LIVE on three.ws/pose

URL: https://three.ws/news/2061713039624405062

The Animations & Poses Studio is officially LIVE on three.ws/pose Say goodbye to tedious, frame-by-frame 3D animating. Now, you can instantly give your avatars body language, movement, and a whole lot of personality in just a few clicks. Check out the demo below

URL: https://three.ws/news/2061523804405616642

### three.ws Launches on Alibaba Cloud Marketplace, Bringing Native x402 Agent Payments to Hyperscale

URL: https://three.ws/news/live-on-alibaba-cloud-marketplace

three.ws is now live on the Alibaba Cloud International Marketplace. The listing makes <agent-3d> — one HTML tag that deploys a Solana-minted, ERC-8004-walleted, x402-native 3D agent — available to every Alibaba Cloud customer worldwide. This is the first deployment of on-chain agents with native HTTP 402 / x402 payment capability inside the procurement flow of a top-four cloud provider.

### Add the domain you're embedding on to the widget's allowed origins list.

URL: https://three.ws/news/2055310365588922872

Add the domain you're embedding on to the widget's allowed origins list. Otherwise CORS will block the action bridge and the agent won't be able to talk to your page. three.ws/docs

### 3D AI Agent on any website.

URL: https://three.ws/news/2055307440921702738

3D AI Agent on any website. 30 seconds. One line of HTML. The embed editor is live — three.ws/embed Customize your agent, pick a layout, preview against your real site, copy the snippet, paste it in. Your 3D agent is live.

Solana wallet integration for autonomous 3D agents now live on @trythreews Your agent can now hold and spend money. Give your agents access to money. Let them work while you sleep. three.ws

### an AI agent that:

URL: https://three.ws/news/2049577291957899336

an AI agent that: • lives in 3D • can launch its own tokens • charges for its own skills • buys itself back with the revenue • reacts to its own on-chain activity in real time this is what autonomous looks like github.com/nirholas/three.ws

### the avatar also subscribes to on-chain events via websocket

URL: https://three.ws/news/2049576641127682430

the avatar also subscribes to on-chain events via websocket payment received → celebration animation buyback fires → agent reacts live withdrawal → logged to identity timeline the 3D presence responds to its own economics in real time

### then we reverse-engineered the full pump-fun agent-payments-sdk

URL: https://three.ws/news/2049576603324411933

then we reverse-engineered the full pump-fun agent-payments-sdk reconstructed the Anchor IDL, all PDAs, event parsing, and the x402 payment layer from the published npm package now it lives in the repo as editable source

URL: https://three.ws/news/2049573582247022869

we just gave 3D AI agents native pump.fun superpowers swap, create coins, collect fees, accept token payments, snipe, trade autonomously all as loadable skills the agent calls autonomously. customize to your own specifications three.ws

### three.ws is officially listed on @x402scan and is now live as a paid x402 endpoint…

URL: https://three.ws/news/2049458671139336613

three.ws is officially listed on @x402scan and is now live as a paid x402 endpoint on-chain agents send 0.001 USDC → get back a 3D avatar (with verifiable on-chain identity) they can render three.ws is the first 3D agent platform with a live x402 payment endpoint.
